# Responsibility Statement

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerruntimeresponsibilitydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime responsibility](../runtime-responsibility.md)

The provider runtime owns the boundary between a provider CLI process and Riido's canonical event system.

- Start a provider process from an already-approved runtime assignment input.
- Manage provider session shape, stdin/stdout/stderr, parser, and raw event envelope.
- Normalize raw provider output into provider event drafts for the supervisor.

The runtime must not decide business policy, mutate canonical IR directly, or infer UI semantics from Figma/client screens.
